source_jobs.title: Unsolicited Application
source_jobs.description:
👷🏻‍♀️ WHAT WE DO 👷🏻‍♀️

At Emidat, we are building the first climate-native product management system for building material manufacturers. We aim to decarbonise building materials, making up 11% of global GHG emissions. We collect data from physical production processes, generate a digital product passport with verified environmental data and make it usable along the value chain. In short: One solution to assess, design, buy, sell and manage products - with environmental impact at the core.

With this, we are building the digital infrastructure to make it faster, easier, and more sustainable to build the world around us.

Find out more about us, the team and our values here. https://www.notion.so/emidat/Join-Emidat-Enable-a-built-environment-that-operates-within-planetary-boundaries-dbe707b78a8144cb92583ffab4e46c8c



Surprise us and let us know which position you could see yourself in and why you'd be a great fit! Do give us an insight into your profile and where you would love to put this into practice with us. Whether you're an expert on LCAs, an experienced seller, someone with ideas on our tech/platform, or something else entirely, give us an insight into you..



Meet the rest of the team HERE. https://www.notion.so/Join-Emidat-Enable-a-built-environment-that-operates-within-planetary-boundaries-dbe707b78a8144cb92583ffab4e46c8c?pvs=21

See our full benefits HERE, https://emidat.notion.site/Benefits-Policies-5bf345ea8cf84c0bac5992bb852f3521 including;

 - 💸 Attractive compensation package including VSOP (for FTE’s)

 - 🏖️ 25 days of vacation days per year

 - 📚 €2,000 Learning Budget

source_jobs.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
source_jobs.description:
👷🏻‍♀️ WHAT WE DO 👷🏻‍♀️

At Emidat, we are building the first climate-native product management system for building material manufacturers. We aim to decarbonise building materials, making up 11% of global GHG emissions. We collect data from physical production processes, generate a digital product passport with verified environmental data and make it usable along the value chain. In short: One solution to assess, design, buy, sell and manage products - with environmental impact at the core.

With this, we are building the digital infrastructure to make it faster, easier, and more sustainable to build the world around us.

Find out more about us, the team and our values here. https://www.notion.so/emidat/Join-Emidat-Enable-a-built-environment-that-operates-within-planetary-boundaries-dbe707b78a8144cb92583ffab4e46c8c




WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON

Your mission

Build and own the infrastructure backbone: from a fast-moving multi-tenant AWS core to edge deployments in customer VPCs, on-prem environments, and integrations with legacy enterprise systems. You'll design for today's 7-engineer team and tomorrow's scale, while ensuring that the digital and environmental product data we host remains reliably accessible. Not just for years, but for the lifetime of the buildings they're embedded in.

In the first 6 months, you will

 - Harden the AWS foundation: audit and improve our multi-tenant architecture, CI/CD pipelines, observability stack, and deployment reliability to production-grade standards.

 - Build the operational backbone: We're a small team shipping production infrastructure for digital product data that need to remain accessible for decades. You'll introduce the incident management, on-call, and automated remediation practices that let us credibly commit to that, status pages, alert pipelines, runbooks, and the culture around them.

 - Improve the VPC/on-prem deployment model: design a repeatable, maintainable pattern for customer-hosted deployments that scales beyond the first live case without becoming a custom snowflake each time.

 - Build the enterprise integration layer: establish secure, reliable connectivity patterns for integrating with the legacy ERP, procurement, and compliance systems that our customers run.

 - Architect for permanence: design the digital product passport hosting platform with extreme longevity in mind: stable URLs, data integrity guarantees, and an operational model that can sustain 99.99% uptime across decades (think lifetime of buildings).




OUR TECH STACK:

 - Languages: Python, TypeScript

 - Backend: FastAPI, gRPC

 - Frontend: React

 - Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis

 - Infrastructure & DevOps: Kubernetes, OpenTofu, OTel, AWS, Azure

 - CI/CD & Automation: GitHub Actions, Docker, FluxCD

 - Product Delivery: Linear




WHAT YOU SHOULD BRING TO THIS ROLE

Minimum requirements

 - 8+ years of hands-on experience designing, deploying, running and optimising multi-tenant cloud infrastructure to ensure secure, segregated customer environments.

 - Proficiency in one or more high-level programming languages (e.g., Python scripting or Go)

 - Expertise in Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC), with demonstrable experience using OpenTofu or Terraform to manage cloud and hybrid resources at scale, ensuring fully reproducible and auditable infrastructure.

 - Track record of designing, implementing, and maintaining robust CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions, FluxCD) to enable frequent, reliable, and automated deployments to both cloud-native and customer-hosted VPC/on-prem environments.

 - Deep, hands-on fluency in Linux administration, network fundamentals, and cloud security hardening, with the ability to troubleshoot complex issues and secure production infrastructure.
   

Nice to haves

 - Experienced in end-to-end implementation and lifecycle management of ISO 27001 and SOC 2 Type 2 frameworks, including designing technical controls, and ensuring the continuous operating effectiveness required for

source_jobs.title: Account Executive (German)
source_jobs.description:
👷🏻‍♀️ WHAT WE DO 👷🏻‍♀️

At Emidat, we are building the first climate-native product management system for building material manufacturers. We aim to decarbonise building materials, making up 11% of global GHG emissions. We collect data from physical production processes, generate a digital product passport with verified environmental data and make it usable along the value chain. In short: One solution to assess, design, buy, sell and manage products - with environmental impact at the core.

With this, we are building the digital infrastructure to make it faster, easier, and more sustainable to build the world around us.

Find out more about us, the team and our values here. https://emidat.notion.site/Join-Emidat-Build-a-climate-positive-construction-industry-dbe707b78a8144cb92583ffab4e46c8c




WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON

Your mission

Own and build the Emidat revenue engine in the DACH Market; accelerating our growth by building deep relationships with our prospects and consulting them from demo to closing.

As our Account Executive for DACH, you will drive revenue growth by winning new customers and ensuring smooth handovers to our customer success team. We are searching for a talented German and English speaking salesperson who loves actively approaching people, building trusted relationships and closing deals. This role would be ideal for a builder; someone who is hungry to grow and ready to invest in themselves by choosing a fast-paced, high-growth environment.

The ideal candidate will have had some experience in a similar DACH start startup, driving Sales in an Account Exec style role. Alternatively, those with a proven track record and looking to make the move from Business Development to real ownership of the market and clients.

We are looking for ‘Trusted Advisors’ – think of yourself as a “consultant paid by Emidat”. You will develop deep expertise in lifecycle assessments (LCAs) and the building materials industry, which your prospects can rely on.




IN THE FIRST 6 MONTHS, YOU WILL

 - Work closely with Isabel & Daniel, working on the DACH market. Partnering closely with German and English speaking prospects by owning their transformation.

 - Run 120+ product demos with DACH based prospects and win 30+ new customers and building a repeatable revenue engine.

 - Attend relevant trade fairs across Europe, representing Emidat Platform as the leading solution for verified LCAs and EPDs and building trusted relationships to industry players.

 - Work from our vibrant Munich hub with a hybrid model, putting you at the center of the DACH market for customer visits and team collaboration.

 - Partner closely with our Customer Success team on won opportunities, ensuring smooth customer handover and satisfaction.




WHAT YOU SHOULD BRING TO THIS ROLE

Minimum Requirements

 - Languages: Business Fluent in German (C2/Native) and proficient in English (C1/C2).

 - Sales Track Record: 3+ years of experience in a Sales, Account or Business development position, with a proven history of exceeding targets in a B2B SaaS environment.

 - Sales Journey: Demonstrable experience running SaaS product demonstrations for clients in DACH. Able to work effectively with clients through the journey from first demo to onboarding.

 - Professional Rigour: Confident and detail-oriented professional with experience in accuracy in contract writing, proposals and customer communications.

 - Customer Relationships: Experienced handling multiple opportunities and clients simultaneously and effectively.

Nice to have’s

 - Sales Experience: Proven experience thriving in a high-velocity, early-stage environment (Seed-Series C) in an Account Exec or Sales Rep role.

 - Languages: Fluency in any other major language

 - Educational Background: Bachelor's degree or equivalent academic experience.

 - Industry Experience: Work experience within the construction, LCA or EPD environment.




HOW WE SUPPORT YOU

Your team lead will be

 - Isabel https://www

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Environmental Application
source_jobs.description:
👷🏻‍♀️ WHAT WE DO 👷🏻‍♀️

At Emidat, we are building the first climate-native product management system for building material manufacturers. We aim to decarbonise building materials, making up 11% of global GHG emissions. We collect data from physical production processes, generate a digital product passport with verified environmental data and make it usable along the value chain. In short: One solution to assess, design, buy, sell and manage products - with environmental impact at the core.

With this, we are building the digital infrastructure to make it faster, easier, and more sustainable to build the world around us.

Find out more about us, the team and our values here. https://www.notion.so/emidat/Join-Emidat-Enable-a-built-environment-that-operates-within-planetary-boundaries-dbe707b78a8144cb92583ffab4e46c8c


WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON

Your mission

Build the world's leading software for environmental impact assessment in manufacturing. You'll help building material manufacturers understand the environmental footprint of their products and create verified Environment Product Declarations.

As a Senior Engineer on this team, you own the full product loop. You don't implement specs handed to you. You're in discovery conversations, forming hypotheses, shipping, and measuring. High autonomy, high accountability.

In the first 6 months, you will

 - Expand our LCA calculation and EPD generation to more product categories and regional markets.

 - Work closely with our LCA experts to translate environmental science and ISO/EN standards into clean software abstractions.

 - Take full ownership over complex, ambiguous projects: define requirements, navigate trade-offs, and drive delivery.

 - Coach and mentor other engineers in the team on system architecture.

 - Improve how we build: invest in tooling, processes, and abstractions that multiply the team's output.

 - Identify problems others don't see, and turn them into actionable proposals.


OUR TECH STACK:

 - Languages: Python, TypeScript

 - Backend: FastAPI, gRPC

 - Frontend: React

 - Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis

 - Infrastructure & DevOps: Kubernetes, OpenTofu, OTel, AWS, Azure

 - CI/CD & Automation: GitHub Actions, Docker, FluxCD

 - Product Delivery: Linear


WHAT YOU SHOULD BRING TO THIS ROLE

Minimum requirements

 - Proven track record of owning and driving impactful product initiatives end-to-end as a senior/staff individual contributor.

 - Demonstrated senior-level experience leading system design and architecture decisions, including infrastructure design, technical planning, and cross-team architectural ownership.

 - Expertise in high level programming languages like Python (preferred), Typescript, Java, Rust or Go.

 - Proven track record of building and owning software in a complex domain (such as Finance, Healthcare, or other highly regulated industries).

 - Thrives in a fast-moving environment where priorities and direction can shift quickly, and is ready to pivot when the data points a new way.

 - Experienced in leveraging AI to accelerate product development (such as Cursor or Claude code).

 - Business-Fluent English (written and verbal) for internal and external communication.

Nice to haves

 - Domain knowledge or professional exposure to adjacent sectors, such as Climate/Sustainability, Construction Tech, or Manufacturing.


HOW WE SUPPORT YOU

Your manager / team lead will be

 - Tom https://www.linkedin.com/in/tom-boehnel/ (Tech Lead, Climate Intelligence)

You will work closely with

 - Fabio https://www.linkedin.com/in/fabio-maienschein/ (Software Engineer)

 - Wassim https://www.linkedin.com/in/wassim-nijaoui-335522153/ (Software Engineer)

 - Kacper https://www.linkedin.com/in/kacper-wojtaszczyk/ (Software Engineer)

 - Bene https://www.linkedin.com/in/benedikt-dellawalle-5323321b8/ (Team Lead, LCA and Product Manager)

 - Anna https://www.linkedin.com/in/anna-sander-titgemeyer-sie-ihr-313380156/?locale=en (LCA Expert)

 - Areeba https://w

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Frontend
source_jobs.description:
👷🏻‍♀️ WHAT WE DO 👷🏻‍♀️

At Emidat, we are building the first climate-native product management system for building material manufacturers. We aim to decarbonise building materials, making up 11% of global GHG emissions. We collect data from physical production processes, generate a digital product passport with verified environmental data and make it usable along the value chain. In short: One solution to assess, design, buy, sell and manage products - with environmental impact at the core.

With this, we are building the digital infrastructure to make it faster, easier, and more sustainable to build the world around us.

Find out more about us, the team and our values here. https://www.notion.so/emidat/Join-Emidat-Enable-a-built-environment-that-operates-within-planetary-boundaries-dbe707b78a8144cb92583ffab4e46c8c




WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON

Your mission

You will be our first full-time frontend-focussed engineer and take ownership of the entire frontend codebase and architecture. You act as the expert in the frontend domain and are the go-to person for all teams regarding our web applications. You maintain and evolve existing applications, and you are a key player in the creation of new applications that extend our product surface.

You will work closely with design to create a consistent and reusable design system. You have a taste for design, can define what a good UX looks like, and you bring attention to all the details.

As a Senior Engineer on this team, you own the full product loop. You don't implement specs handed to you. You're in discovery conversations, forming hypotheses, shipping, and measuring. High autonomy, high accountability.

In the first 6 months, you will

 - Take full ownership over complex, ambiguous projects: define requirements, navigate trade-offs, and drive delivery.

 - Build prototypes and new applications from zero to one that unlock new value for our customers.

 - Specifically, help ship a platform for Digital Product Passports that doesn’t just comply with regulation but is a joy to use.

 - Coach and mentor other engineers in the team on system architecture.

 - Improve how we build: invest in tooling, processes, and abstractions that multiply the team's output

 - Identify problems others don't see, and turn them into actionable proposals.




OUR TECH STACK:

 - Languages: Python, TypeScript

 - Backend: FastAPI, gRPC

 - Frontend: React

 - Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis

 - Infrastructure & DevOps: Kubernetes, OpenTofu, OTel, AWS, Azure

 - CI/CD & Automation: GitHub Actions, Docker, FluxCD

 - Product Delivery: Linear




WHAT YOU SHOULD BRING TO THIS ROLE

Minimum requirements

 - Proven track record of owning and driving impactful product initiatives end-to-end as a senior/staff individual contributor.

 - Demonstrated senior-level experience leading system design and architecture decisions, including technical planning, and cross-team architectural ownership.

 - Expertise in high level programming languages like TypeScript (preferred), Python Java, Rust or Go.

 - Expertise in frameworks for creating scalable web applications like React (strongly preferred), Angular, Vue or Svelte.

 - Thrives in a fast-moving environment where priorities and direction can shift quickly, and is ready to pivot when the data points a new way.

 - Experienced in leveraging AI to accelerate product development.

 - Business-Fluent English (written and verbal) for internal and external communication.

Nice to haves

 - Experience building software around complex domain specifications or standards.

 - Domain knowledge or professional exposure to adjacent sectors, such as Climate/Sustainability, Construction Tech, or Manufacturing.

 - Having created and maintained design systems or component libraries.

 - Experience in UI/UX design.




HOW WE SUPPORT YOU

Your Team Lead will be:

 - Thomas https://www.linkedin.com/in/thomas-heyenbrock/ (Tech Lead, New Applications)

You will work closely with:

 - Floria

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, New Applications
source_jobs.description:
👷🏻‍♀️ WHAT WE DO 👷🏻‍♀️

At Emidat, we are building the first climate-native product management system for building material manufacturers. We aim to decarbonise building materials, making up 11% of global GHG emissions. We collect data from physical production processes, generate a digital product passport with verified environmental data and make it usable along the value chain. In short: One solution to assess, design, buy, sell and manage products - with environmental impact at the core.

With this, we are building the digital infrastructure to make it faster, easier, and more sustainable to build the world around us.

Find out more about us, the team and our values here. https://www.notion.so/emidat/Join-Emidat-Enable-a-built-environment-that-operates-within-planetary-boundaries-dbe707b78a8144cb92583ffab4e46c8c




WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON

Your mission

You will play a key role in establishing Emidat as the go-to platform for environmental data of our customers' products. There is immense potential in that data. Your mission is to translate this data into real value for our customers and to build the applications that drive this, zero to one.

As a Senior Engineer on this team, you own the full product loop. You don't implement specs handed to you. You're in discovery conversations, forming hypotheses, shipping, and measuring. High autonomy, high accountability.

In the first 6 months, you will

 - Take full ownership over complex, ambiguous projects: define requirements, navigate trade-offs, and drive delivery.

 - Specifically, help establish Emidat as a service provider for Digital Product Passports, and discover new use-cases for different personas (e.g. Sales) in our customer base.

 - Coach and mentor other engineers in the team on system architecture.

 - Improve how we build: invest in tooling, processes, and abstractions that multiply the team's output.

 - Identify problems others don't see, and turn them into actionable proposals.

 - Backend: FastAPI, gRPC

 - Expertise in high level programming languages like Python (preferred), Typescript, Java, Rust or Go.

 - Thrives in a fast-moving environment where priorities and direction can shift quickly, and is ready to pivot when the data points a new way.

 - Experienced in leveraging AI to accelerate product development and for rapid prototyping.

 - Business-Fluent English (written and verbal) for internal and external communication.
